subject: GRB 110709B: correction to GCN 12135 (Konus-Wind peak flux)
body:
D. Frederiks on behalf of the Konus-Wind team:

The correct value of GRB 110709B peak energy flux
measured by Konus-Wind is (1.1 � 0.1)x10-6 erg/cm2/s,
this is an order of magnitude lower than it is reported
in GCN 12135.

We apologize for this misprint.
